description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian figure with long, straight hair and a confident, upright stance. The individual is dressed in a knee-length, belted tunic with wide sleeves, layered over fitted pants that are tucked into tall, structured boots. The tunic features a prominent belt with metallic accents and a decorative clasp at the waist, while the sleeves are rolled up to reveal contrasting inner cuffs. The figure wears a wide wristband or bracelet on one arm, adding a touch of character. The overall appearance is that of a modern or slightly fantasy-inspired urban dweller, with a practical yet distinctive outfit suitable for city streets. The facial features are soft and stylized, contributing to a friendly and approachable demeanor.
description: A stylized adult figure in a belted tunic, fitted pants, and tall boots, with long straight hair and a confident, upright posture. The outfit is accented by a wide wristband and metallic belt details.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full outfit, facial features, belt details, and both arms extended with a visible wristband on the left arm.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the layered tunic, and the structured boots, with the wristband visible on the left wrist.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the long, straight hair falling down the back, the back of the tunic, and the boots, with both arms extended.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile of the face and body, the tunic's side slit, and the boots, with no wristband visible on this side.
attribute_clothing_type: knee-length belted tunic with wide sleeves, fitted pants, and tall structured boots
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: long straight hair with layered ends
